ham.subject: Corporate VPN Maintenance – Schedule & Instructions
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Kripya dhyaan dein ki hamara corporate VPN 12 May 2024, Wednesday, 22:00 se 02:00 UTC tak maintain kiya jayega. Is dauran aapko limited connectivity ka samna karna pad sakta hai. 21:30 UTC tak VPN se log out kar lein aur kaam ka backup le lein. Maintenance ke baad updated credentials ka use kar ke reconnect karein. Agar koi samasya ho to IT Support se sampark karein.

Dhanyavaad,

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Overdue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Humne notice kiya hai ki aapka QuickBooks invoice (Invoice #12345) April 2024 ka abhi tak payment nahi hua. Record ke mutabik ₹15,000 ka payment overdue hai. Agar 48 ghante ke andar is amount ko settle nahi kiya gaya, toh aapka account temporarily suspend ho jayega aur service interruptions ho sakte hain.

Kripya neeche diye gaye link par click karke invoice ko dekhein aur payment karein:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
QuickBooks Billing Team
